mail_p: Zero-cost transparent email proxy system based on Cloudflare Email Workers + Resend. Email Routing inbound → Worker processing → forward/reply/send.
mail_arch: External sender → Email Routing → mail-worker → rule matching: non-owner emails get embedded metadata + forwarded, owner emails treated as replies.
mail_features:
• Auto-routing: forward vs reply based on sender identity
• Metadata embedding in headers (reply-capable forwarding)
• Send via Resend API (SPF/DKIM/DMARC compliant)
• Runs entirely on Cloudflare Workers free tier (100k/day)
